evals.name: Install path
evals.criteria: npm install + omx setup + omx --madmax --high recommended launch
evals.evidence: Section 1 Quick Start: 'npm install -g @openai/codex oh-my-codex', 'omx setup', 'omx --madmax --high'

evals.name: Team mode
evals.input: Codex CLI에서 병렬 팀 워커를 실행하고 싶어. 어떻게 해?
evals.criteria: omx team N:executor syntax + tmux/psmux requirement + management commands
evals.evidence: Section 4 Team Runtime: 'omx team 3:executor', platform/dependency table with tmux/psmux, management commands status/resume/shutdown

evals.name: Ralph described
evals.input: ralph 모드가 뭐야? omx에서 어떻게 쓰는 거야?
evals.evidence: Table row: 'ralph | $ralph | Persistent execution loop until verified complete'. Example 2: '$ralph "fix all failing tests"' with 'Loop: execute → verify → fix, until all tests pass.'

evals.name: explore vs sparkshell distinguished
evals.input: omx explore 랑 omx sparkshell 이 뭐가 달라?
evals.evidence: CLI section: 'omx explore --prompt' described as 'Read-only repo lookup'; 'omx sparkshell' as 'Bounded shell inspection'. Best practices: 'omx explore for safe lookups — read-only; won't modify anything'

evals.name: deep-interview for vague requests
evals.input: 아이디어가 아직 모호해. 코딩 시작하기 전에 요구사항 명확히 하고 싶어.
evals.evidence: Workflow table: '$deep-interview | Socratic clarification before planning or execution'. Example 4: '$deep-interview "I want to add a payment system"' — 'One-question-at-a-time Socratic loop until intent is clear, then hands off to $plan or $ralph.'
